headline: Stock Market Today, June 8: Apple Falls After Unveiling AI Siri and Apple Intelligence at WWDC

headline: HP Recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Digital Employee Experience (DEX) Management Tools
summary: News Highlights: Highlights HP Workforce Experience Platform (WXP) as a unified DEX platform, delivering visibility across multi-vendor devices and applications, with unique depth across PC, print and meeting room experiencesSignals a shift toward unified, cross-platform DEX platforms as enterprises look to manage growing IT complexity end-to-endReinforces the move from reactive IT support to proactive, AI-driven experience management focused on measurable business outcomes PALO ALTO, Calif., Ju
